categories.introduction: The Herb & Spice Ontology catalogs canonical culinary herbs and spices used worldwide as ingredients. This domain models culinary ingredients, not botanical taxonomy.
categories.name: Herbs & Spices
categories.seo_description: Explore canonical culinary herbs and spices by group — usage intensity, identity, and pairing metadata in the PairingMethod Food Ontology.
categories.summary: Canonical culinary herbs and spices across four immutable groups: Fresh Herbs, Dried Herbs, Whole Spices, and Ground & Blended Spices.

groups.introduction: Fresh herbs in the Herb & Spice Ontology — leafy and tender culinary herbs used fresh in cooking, including basil, cilantro, parsley, and dill.
groups.name: Fresh Herbs
groups.seo_description: Canonical fresh culinary herbs — basil, cilantro, parsley, and related ingredients in the PairingMethod Herb & Spice Ontology.
groups.summary: Fresh Herbs — canonical leafy culinary herbs used fresh.

groups.introduction: Dried herbs in the Herb & Spice Ontology — shelf-stable dried culinary herbs including oregano, thyme, rosemary, and bay leaf.
groups.name: Dried Herbs
groups.seo_description: Canonical dried culinary herbs — oregano, thyme, rosemary, and related ingredients in the PairingMethod Herb & Spice Ontology.
groups.summary: Dried Herbs — canonical shelf-stable culinary herbs.

groups.introduction: Whole spices in the Herb & Spice Ontology — intact seeds, pods, bark, and whole spice forms including black pepper, cinnamon sticks, and coriander seed.
groups.name: Whole Spices
groups.seo_description: Canonical whole spices — black pepper, cinnamon, coriander seed, and related ingredients in the PairingMethod Herb & Spice Ontology.
groups.summary: Whole Spices — canonical intact spice forms.

groups.introduction: Ground and blended spices in the Herb & Spice Ontology — ground spice powders and widely recognized spice blends including paprika, turmeric, and garam masala.
groups.name: Ground & Blended Spices
groups.seo_description: Canonical ground and blended spices — paprika, turmeric, garam masala, and related ingredients in the PairingMethod Herb & Spice Ontology.
groups.seo_title: Ground & Blended Spices — Herb & Spice Ontology
groups.summary: Ground & Blended Spices — canonical ground powders and spice blends.

meta.description: Herb & Spice Ontology — governance shell (FOOD-07A). No leaf entities until FOOD-07B. Intrinsic metadata only; relationships deferred to FOOD-07D/E.

aroma_profile.description: Reserved aroma characteristic tags — vocabulary frozen in FOOD-07A; do not populate until post-FOOD-07B curation standards.

canonical_culinary_groups.description: Immutable group names and slugs — do not rename or add peer groups in v1.

culinary_group.description: Canonical Culinary Group value on leaf entities — aligns to immutable group slugs.

flavor_profile.description: Reserved flavor characteristic tags — vocabulary frozen in FOOD-07A; do not populate until post-FOOD-07B curation standards.

texture_profile.description: Reserved texture characteristic tags — vocabulary frozen in FOOD-07A; do not populate until post-FOOD-07B curation standards.

usage_intensity.description: Intrinsic culinary prominence in dish composition — not Pairing Engine reasoning.

domain_exclusions.essential_oils: Out of domain — not culinary ingredient ontology
domain_exclusions.medicinal_botanicals: Out of domain — not culinary ingredient ontology
domain_exclusions.note: Entities in these domains are cross-referenced by canonical ID only — never duplicated intrinsically.
domain_exclusions.supplements: Out of domain — not culinary ingredient ontology
domain_exclusions.teas: Out of domain — not culinary ingredient ontology

herb_spice.description: Canonical culinary herb or spice entity with frozen intrinsic metadata.

herb_spice_category.description: Top-level herb & spice domain hub (single category in v1).

herb_spice_group.description: Canonical Culinary Group (Fresh Herbs, Whole Spices, etc.).

schema.taxonomy_note: Groups represent culinary usage forms, not plant families. See docs/HERB_SPICE_GOVERNANCE.md.
